results.title: Las Vegas Sands AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Las Vegas Sands has positioned itself as a leader in AI and technology integration within the hospitality and gaming industry[1]. The company operates advanced smart table technology across its properties in Singapore and Macau, utilizing Angel's smart table solutions that incorporate RFID, video analytics, and artificial intelligence[2]. Through its Sands Resorts Incubation Centre launched in 2023, the company supports technology entrepreneurs by providing access to real-world testing environments at its properties[3]. Las Vegas Sands has also expanded its innovation initiatives through programs like the Sands Innovation Challenge and the Macao Technological Innovation Exploration, which connect entrepreneurs with cutting-edge technologies including AI and robotics[4][5].

Learn how to Maximize GPU Utilization in Amazon EKS with NVIDIA Run:ai. Co-authored with Ashok Srirama , Sukirti Gupta and Chad Chapman ! Happy to share our latest blog with NVIDIA on maximizing GPU utilization with NVIDIA Run:ai solution. 

As AI/ML workloads grow, managing GPU resources efficiently becomes crucial. Run:ai's fractional GPU technology lets user dynamically allocate GPU resources, moving away from the traditional static approach, thus optimizing GPU utilization. It supports all NVIDIA CUDA-enabled GPUs and seamlessly integrates with user's existing Kubernetes setup.

Big news from the team I'm proud to be part of: OpenObserve just raised $10M Series A backed by Nexus Venture Partners and Dell Technologies Capital . 

We built a unified observability platform in Rust: native correlation, full fidelity data, no forced sampling, and up to 140x lower storage cost. Today, we’re also launching Observability 3.0 with autonomous AI SRE, anomaly detection, and LLM observability, all in one platform. 

This is what modern observability should look like. 

Huge thanks to our seed investors Secure Octane , Alexander Erikstrup and Cardinia Ventures for believing in us. #LLMobservability #observability #AIOps
...
I joined Amazon on March 8, 2021 as an SME in Cloud, Containers, and Kubernetes. What I did not plan was the pivot. ChatGPT launched in November 2022 and something clicked. I went all in on AI/ML and GenAI, from GPU optimizations to LLM inference on Kubernetes to HPC workloads on EKS. It has been one wild, humbling, and deeply rewarding ride ever since.
...
13+ technical blogs, 6 deep in AI/ML. Chalk talks and builder sessions at re:Invent. AWS Summits in NYC, LA, and Washington DC. Countless customer meetings across enterprise and financial services. Workshops built and scaled. Original open source contributions under awslabs and aws-samples, and proud to have collaborated on projects like Data on EKS, AI on EKS, and Istio on EKS with some genuinely great minds.
...
The infrastructure was never the destination. It was always the people, the problems, and the craft. 

1,866 days of building. I am Not done building. 

Just building somewhere new. #AWS #Kubernetes #EKS #GenAI #CloudNative #DataOnEKS #AIonEKS #OpenSource #LLMInference #HPC #BhagavadGita

I enjoy the process of creating new things, and then improving on them. In my career as a tester, this has often involved helping developers find bugs to make our product better – but has also shown up in automation that I've done, and suggestions that I've made, to make our automation more user-friendly. I like to think that I have a good sense of humor – and like to try to make my coworkers laugh when I run into them in the hallways, or we're out at lunch. I love the current indie scene in videogames. Many small developers are taking risks to make games that are unique and fascinating while, due to the cost of making a triple-A title, most of the biggest companies release slight modifications on a formula that they know will be sell well, and recoup their investment. ### Director Data Science at [Caesars Entertainment, Inc.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/caesars-entertainment-corporation) (Current)
...
Jan 2021 - Present (5 years and 5 months) in Las Vegas, Nevada, United States
...
As the Director of Data Science at Caesars Entertainment, I led the design and development of an automated hotel price recommender system for Caesars Las Vegas hotels. This system forecasts demand by analyzing anticipated tradeshows, sporting events, music festivals, and other local events in Las Vegas. It also predicts reservation behavior based on pricing up to one year in advance. The system ensures optimal occupancy rates, preventing early sell-outs and maintaining a 99% final occupancy rate. I led a dedicated team responsible for the creation and implementation of Caesars’ NFL Game Simulator, utilizing Monte Carlo simulations to generate pregame and in-play odds for Caesars Sportsbook. Our simulator employs cutting-edge modeling algorithms to deliver highly accurate and precise odds, simulating tens of thousands of events per second. This technological advancement provides Caesars with a significant competitive edge in the market.

# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
### Location: United States
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
- Working knowledge
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.

# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
technical field. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts
